indicators.name: tablecloth-covered dining table
indicators.rationale: The tablecloth suggests the table is currently in use, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: chairs around the table
indicators.rationale: Chairs around the table suggest the area is currently in use, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is not comfortable to lie on and can be noisy.

indicators.name: no bed or other resting surface
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other resting surface present, which is essential for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or other resting surface, and the presence of chairs and a tablecloth-covered dining table suggests the area is currently in use, which is not conducive to sleep. The hard flooring also makes it uncomfortable to lie on.
